User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow internal API paths from being listed in SERPs
# (they're crawlable for link-following but not useful as landing pages)
Disallow: /api/

# XML sitemap — dynamically generated by the API server; includes home,
# /games, /boutique, and every individual release page.
# Registered in Google Search Console at:
#   https://search.google.com/search-console → Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://discwatchhq.com/api/sitemap.xml
